title: Send Heartbeats with Ticker and select in Go
summary: Send periodic heartbeat timestamps from Go with one time.Ticker, one output channel, and select.
highlights: Drops extra ticks when receivers lag
verification_notes: Run from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4. The verified test suite covers interval validation, periodic heartbeats, delayed first ticks, cancellation, lagging receivers, and repeated drained reads.
